SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-11-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-11-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANTS DAUGHTER GENA YI INTERPRETED HER IN KOREAN. DEFENDANT WAIVED SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-11-2012 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT YI, JAE YOUNG
